pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.3.4.RELEASE to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3 ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; running Spring Boot 3.x on Java 11 or using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 features causes runtime incompatibilities or missing API support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17 as the minimum version; compiling with Java 11 settings against Spring Boot 3.x dependencies will result in compilation errors due to missing language features or API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate MySQL connector dependency from the legacy groupId/artifactId to the new com.mysql/mysql-connector-j coordinates.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact mysql:mysql-connector-java was deprecated and removed in newer versions; using the old coordinates with Spring Boot 3.x or modern MySQL drivers results in dependency resolution failures or runtime classpath issues.
